creator: antiduh@gmail.com
text: Yeah, poking around in PR 191311 (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=191311), it looks like the old port actually had patches to move LDFLAGS around. One of the obsolete patches in 191311 show those patch files getting updates, but I guess that everything got discarded in the update. I guess that means we should try to make a strong effort to get these patches merged upstream.
